temporal_description: A man with short, dark hair, wearing a black leather jacket, is shown in profile. The camera is positioned behind him, initially focusing on his back as he walks into a dimly lit room. The setting appears to be a simple, somewhat cluttered space, possibly a small eatery or a breakroom. The lighting is cool and has a greenish-blue tint. In the background, a wall with a poster is visible, and a small, round table sits in the middle of the room. The camera follows the man as he approaches the table. The audio consists of a low, rhythmic, and slightly tense electronic beat that creates a suspenseful and modern atmosphere. The sound of footsteps on a hard floor is heard as the man walks, followed by the soft clatter of a plate being placed on a table. He places a small white plate with food on it down on the table. The table also holds a large thermos with a yellow lid and another container. The camera remains steady, now positioned behind the man, showing his back as he sits down at the table. The shot is slightly shaky, suggesting a handheld camera. The overall atmosphere is quiet and somber. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner of the screen. There is no dialogue or narration.
